meta.title: Solutions and Case Studies | WEI LAN Recycling Equipment
meta.description: Explore WEI LAN recycling solutions and case study summaries for PET bottle sorting, HDPE and PP sorting, construction waste recycling, bulky waste processing, and smart recovery centers.

pageTitle: Built around real waste streams and project conditions
bodyHtml:
Solutions by Material

Built around real waste streams and project conditions

Use material type, target output, available footprint, and automation level to match the right WEI LAN system configuration before quotation and layout planning.

01

PET bottle sorting

Separate transparent, green, blue, and mixed-color PET streams with AI recognition and cyclic intelligent sorting.

  • Input: post-consumer PET bottles
  • Output: value-ready PET color streams
  • Recommended system: AI optical sorting
02

HDPE and PP sorting

Stabilize plastic recovery for mixed recyclables where manual sorting struggles with material purity and operating consistency.

  • Input: HDPE, PP, mixed rigid plastics
  • Output: cleaner grouped plastic fractions
  • Recommended system: AI optical sorting
03

Construction waste recycling

Recover aggregates, metals, and light materials from construction, decoration, and demolition waste with integrated process control.

  • Input: mixed C&D waste streams
  • Output: recycled aggregate and separated materials
  • Recommended system: Lion One line
04

Bulky waste processing

Handle oversized mixed waste with crushing, screening, magnetic separation, and air separation in a compact project footprint.

  • Input: bulky waste and light mixed waste
  • Output: recyclable fractions and baled material
  • Recommended system: Lion One line

Process Integration

From incoming waste to measurable recycled output

The product architecture covers preprocessing, counting and pricing, crushing, screening, magnetic separation, air separation, intelligent storage, optical sorting, baling, weighing, and remote control.

Pre-sorting AI optical sorting Crushing Screening Air separation Baling Weighing Remote control

Case Studies

Case studies matched to solution paths

Use these compact references to compare waste streams, system direction, and expected output before requesting a detailed proposal package.

Plastic Sorting Reference

Recyclable Materials Sorting Center

Haishu District reference using GL01V2-9 to serve a 1M+ resident recycling network with compact AI plastic bottle sorting, precise category recognition, and real-time operating data.

  • Service area: 1M+ permanent residents in Haishu District
  • Footprint: 600 m² total occupied area
  • Output: up to 9 plastic bottle categories with live statistics
View details

C&D Waste Reference

Construction waste utilization line

Integrated crushing, screening, magnetic separation, and air separation for recycled aggregate and material recovery projects.

  • Material: construction and decoration waste
  • System path: Lion One recycling line
  • Output: aggregate, metal, and light material recovery
View details

Smart Recovery Reference

Resource recovery center with digital cockpit

Modular recovery center concept combining sorting, weighing, reporting, and remote management for mixed municipal waste streams.

  • Material: mixed recyclables and municipal waste
  • System path: sorting modules plus digital control
  • Output: monitored throughput and operational reporting
View details
